refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imlocallapfilt(image); out = imlocallapfilt(image, sigma, amount)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Separates a locally blurred base from image detail and recombines them with a controllable detail amount. The output is normalized double precision data.

refsection.title: Examples
